subcodes.first_line: And concerning Ahmad-i-Kirmani - upon him be that which is upon him - By God, the mind is bewildered and confounded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و اینکه در باره احمد کرمانی علیه ما علیه مرقوم فرمودند تالله عقل متحیر و مبهوت
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @belief and denial, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @transcendence; unknowability of God
